description: Expected local-only HQ baseline categories. This file helps tooling separate persistent personal HQ state from the current session changeset; it is not a gitignore.

categories.description: Company folders, company knowledge repos, projects, settings, data, and workers are user-owned local state.
Thread, learning, report, checkpoint, scratch, and orchestrator state created by HQ sessions.
Canonical local clones and symlinks managed by HQ.
Local settings, generated local sync journals, app runtime state, and non-secret machine config.
Installed HQ packs, generated social assets, and local package payloads.
Core scaffold files may be untracked on installer-created HQ roots until a baseline normalization pass is performed.
